title: Amtech G2615 12" x 0.75" (300mm x 19mm) Cold Chisel - pro
features: DURABLE: This 12" x 0.75" (300mm x 19mm) professional mason's peg / cold chisel is made from carbon steel with a heat treated blade
SAFE: The tool has a rubber grip with a protective hood, making it safe and comfortable to use
SIZE CAPACITY: 12 inch / 3/4 inch / 75 inch / 300 mm / 19 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Chisel See more
